kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09A. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09A" and put them into a temporary table called J09A_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09A" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
    ELSE NULL
END;

WITH eq_counts AS (
    SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
    FROM J09A_temp
    GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NOT NULL THEN ENTSCHEIDUNG
    WHEN eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM eq_counts
WHERE J09A_temp.HAUS = eq_counts.HAUS;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT d.*, e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_Doc_No, e."Installation" AS EABLG_Installation
    FROM J09A_temp d
    LEFT JOIN eablg e
        ON d.ANLAGE = e."Installation"
),
contact AS (
    SELECT
        b.MR_Doc_No,
        b.HAUS,
        b.ANLAGE,
        b.ME_MA_ID,
        b.EQUNR,
        b.HOUSE_NUM1,
        b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
        COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE,
        COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
        COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
        COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET,
        COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
        COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
        COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1,
        COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2,
        COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL,
        CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_sales,
        CASE WHEN n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_net
    FROM base b
    LEFT JOIN net_master n ON b.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON b.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
)
SELECT
    MR_Doc_No AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN TITLE ELSE NULL END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN FORENAME ELSE NULL END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN SURNAME ELSE NULL END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN STREET ELSE NULL END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN STREETNO ELSE NULL END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN POST_CODE1 ELSE NULL END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN CITY1 ELSE NULL END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN CITY2 ELSE NULL END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN has_sales = 1 THEN EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS EMAIL
FROM contact;

args.sql_query:
SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched;
